subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! In truth, in days fraught with such trials and in the face of opposition from the hostile multitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء فی الحقیقه در ایامی چنین شدید و تعرض گروه عنید به این
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @justice and wrath of God
